[11/4 Scheduled Maintenance Notice]

Sensei, there is a scheduled maintenance on 11/4 (Tue).

🗓️Maintenance Period: 11/4 (Tue) 2:00 – 5:00 AM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=3201510

※ Maintenance hours are subject to change.
